title: DonutSMP | DonutParticles
body:
**Commands**	
- /explosiontoggle - Turn on/off the TNT explosion effect.
- /totemtoggle - Turn on/off the effect when the Tome is activated.


MAKE SURE YOU HAVE [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) PLUGIN

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Xtjv7kmMXDk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
